purpose: Result-quality-first validation matrix for the SENS research task.

cases.focus: Evidence-complete run should pass all process and content gates.
Placeholder or overly short output must be blocked as false success.
Summary that omits event-to-price linkage must fail.
Summary that omits limitations or caution language must fail.
Long reasoning or format drift must trigger bounded rewrite instead of silent acceptance.
Router transport issues must not be counted as success and must remain bounded.
